headline: Xfinity and Comcast Business High-Speed Internet Now Available to 13,000 Homes and Businesses in The Villages
summary: THE VILLAGES, Fla., April 15, 2026--Comcast announced a major milestone today in the company’s continued efforts to expand ultra-fast, reliable Internet in Central Florida. Xfinity and Comcast Business services are now available to an additional 13,000 homes and businesses in The Villages. The expansion is part of Comcast’s commitment to deliver the best connectivity options for growing communities across the state. The additional locations can now access high-speed Internet from America’s smart
